mapper.select:
SELECT CTKEY , TA_DTKEY , TA_DTTYPE , OWKEY , ICKEY , FR_LCKEY , FR_IVATKEY , FR_ULCKEY , TO_LCKEY , TO_IVATKEY , TO_ULCKEY , QTY , ICUTKEY , UOM , WKSTATUS , URKEY , OBHDKEY , OBDTKEY , IBHDKEY , IBDTKEY , TA_HDKEY , PIDTKEY , WAHDKEY , FR_QTY , REASONTYPE , IBNRCD , RJQTY , PONRCD , WAHDKEY , LOGGRPCD , FR_LCSTORTYPE , TO_LCSTORTYPE , FR_IB_FLOOR , TO_IB_FLOOR , WKQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TA_DTKEY = #{ta_dtkey}
AND TA_HDKEY = #{ta_hdkey}

SELECT CTKEY ,TA_HDKEY ,OWKEY ,WKSTATUS ,LOGGRPCD ,CYCLEKEY ,CYCLETYP ,CYCLEFR ,CYCLETO ,CLOSDATE ,REMARK ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TA_HDKEY = #{ta_hdkey}
